text.title: Vendor Margin Defense Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the weekly `MarginBleedReport`. Forbidden patterns + valid/invalid examples enforce the 5 core rules and the 6-pattern coverage.

list.item: Alert with `due_by` > 48 business hours from trigger — violates `r3-bleed-alert-threshold`.
`recommended_actions[*].action` referencing "next quarter rate" while project is live — out of scope; belongs in rate calculator.
`pattern_id == "ai_rework_loop"` with < 3 billed iterations on the task — violates rework-vs-loop distinction.
Any `bleed.severity_pct_of_margin > 5` AND `comms_drafted == false` — alert without draft is reporting theatre.

example.note: Single bleed > 5% but no alert; comms_drafted false despite > 5% (reporting theatre); no recommended actions.
